reference: My wife is suffering from extensive thigh, leg, and lower back pain. She is fifty-one years old and approximately fifty-nine kilograms. She maintains her fitness and has regularly been told that she has a low iron count in her blood. She also suffers from high blood pressure. She had breast cancer approximately twelve years ago, and everything has been well since. She is concerned that the pain could be a recurrence of cancer and does not want to see a doctor. Do you believe that the pains are due to low iron?
text: My wife is suffering from extensive thigh, leg, and lower back pain. She is 51 years old and approximately 9 kilograms. She maintains her fitness and has regularly been told that she has a low iron count in her blood. She also suffers from high blood pressure. She had breast cancer approximately 12 years ago, and everything has been well since. She is concerned that the pain could be a recurrence of cancer and does not want to see a doctor. Do you believe that the pains are due to low iron?
